addVenue.descEdit: Update venue information. These changes will be applied immediately.
addVenue.descAdd: Create a new venue in the Luminous network. Step 1 focuses on the primary identity and geographic location of your venue.
addVenue.fillRequired: Please fill all required fields (Name, Category, City, Address and Map selection).
addVenue.venueLogoDesc: Add your brand logo. Square size (1:1) image is recommended.
addVenue.sloganPlaceholder: A short, catchy description for your venue...
addVenue.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the atmosphere, unique features and what guests can expect...
addVenue.branchDesc: Which branch does this venue belong to? If your venue has more than 1 branch, add it (only 1 selection).
addVenue.mapModalDesc: Click or drag on the map to mark the exact location of your venue.

addSpecs.createVenueFirst: Create a venue first to add specifications.
addSpecs.addTierDesc: Add new tiers using buttons above.
addSpecs.heroImageDesc: This image will be shown while informing customers about this tier. Recommended ratio: 16:9. Max: 5MB.
addSpecs.specialPackagesDesc: Manage special campaigns and packages for this venue.
addSpecs.discountError: Discounted price cannot be more than normal price.
addSpecs.iconLibraryDesc: Choose the most suitable icon for the tier
addSpecs.hardwareDesc: Enter technical parameters of the system
addSpecs.featuredModalDesc: Mark the most attractive point of the venue

calendar.configDesc: Complete working hours, contact channels and booking limits.
calendar.workingHoursDesc: Set when the venue is open for visitors.
calendar.phoneDigitsOnly: Phone number must consist only of digits
calendar.minMaxError: Minimum duration cannot be greater than maximum duration.
calendar.saveError: Error occurred while saving venue info.

media.desc: Complete visual appearance and base price of the venue.
media.galleryRequired: Add at least one photo to the gallery.
media.saveError: Error occurred while saving media info.

food.editSubtitle: Update the details of the menu item.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Detailed information about all admin panel features

venueOverview.title: Adding a Venue — Overview
venueOverview.intro: Adding a new venue is a 3-step process. At each step, you can save data as a "Draft" or publish immediately.
venueOverview.step1: Basic Information — Name, category, logo, address, map
venueOverview.step3: Calendar & Contact — Operating hours, phone, email, social media
venueOverview.tip: Use the "Save Draft" button at each step to leave the page without losing data. Draft venues appear in the "Venues" list with DRAFT status.

step1.title: Step 1 — Basic Information
step1.intro: In this step, you enter the venue's identification details. Fields marked with (*) are required.
step1.name: Venue Name
step1.nameDesc: The official name of the venue. This is how it will appear in the app and on the map.
step1.logoDesc: The venue's logo (PNG/JPG). You can use the crop tool after uploading. Recommended size: 512x512px.
step1.categoryDesc: Venue type — PlayStation Club, Cyber Arena, Game Zone, VR Center, etc.
step1.sloganDesc: A short catchy phrase (optional). Displayed as subtitle in the venue card view.
step1.descriptionDesc: Detailed information about the venue (optional). Users see this in venue details.
step1.locationDesc: When you select a point on the map, the address and city are automatically filled. Accurate location helps users find the venue.
step1.branchesDesc: If the venue has multiple branches, you can add them here. Users can choose between branches.
step1.tip: Selecting an accurate point on the map is crucial — mobile app users open navigation based on these coordinates.

step2.title: Step 2 — Media & Pricing
step2.intro: In this step, you set the venue's visual presentation and pricing policy.
step2.galleryDesc: At least 1 photo must be uploaded. High-quality photos attract more user attention. You can drag to reorder photos.
step2.pricingDesc: The venue's minimum hourly price. Must be at least 1 AZN.
step2.tip: Drag and drop photos to reorder them. The first photo is used as the main image in the card view.

step3.title: Step 3 — Calendar & Contact
step3.intro: In the final step, you configure operating hours and contact information.
step3.hoursDesc: Set opening and closing times for each day. You can disable closed days with the "Closed" button.
step3.toggle24Desc: When this toggle is enabled, all days are set to 00:00–00:00 (non-stop service).
step3.phoneDesc: Azerbaijan number in +994 format. Required field.
step3.emailDesc: A properly formatted email address (e.g., info@venue.az). Required field.
step3.whatsappDesc: Contact link in wa.me/number format. Required field.
step3.tip: Contact information is used in the mobile app for direct calling, opening WhatsApp, and navigating to Instagram.

specs.title: Venue Specifications
specs.intro: In this section, you describe the technical specifications of computers and consoles at the venue in detail. This information is shown to users in the mobile app.
specs.tiersDesc: Create different computer/console types at the venue (e.g., Standard PC, VIP PC, PlayStation 5). Each has a name, icon, price, and short description.
specs.hardwareDesc: For PC-type tiers only: add hardware components like processor, graphics card, monitor, etc.
specs.accessoriesDesc: For PC-type tiers only: specify additional equipment like mouse, keyboard, headset.
specs.featuresDesc: You can add up to 3 features per tier (e.g., '240Hz Monitor', 'RGB Lighting'). These are displayed with icons on the card.
specs.packagesDesc: Create discounted or special packages (e.g., '3-Hour Gaming Package'). You can show regular and discounted prices.
specs.tip: Specification details are the most important factor for gamers when choosing a venue. Be as detailed and accurate as possible.

food.title: Food Menu
food.intro: Manage food and drinks sold at your venues from here. Each food item is linked to a venue.
food.name: Food Name
food.nameDesc: The full name of the food item. This is how it will appear in the app.
food.imageDesc: An attractive photo of the food (optional but recommended).
food.categoryDesc: Food category — Burger, Pizza, Drinks, Dessert, etc.
food.venueDesc: Which venue does this food belong to? Select from the list of active venues.

bookings.title: Booking Management
bookings.intro: Manage reservation requests sent by users from the mobile app here.
bookings.pendingDesc: New incoming requests that haven't been responded to yet. You receive notification and sound alerts when new requests arrive.
bookings.acceptDesc: When you accept a request, the user receives a notification and the reservation is confirmed.
bookings.rejectDesc: When rejecting a request, writing a reason is mandatory. The user will see the rejection reason.
bookings.searchDesc: Use the "Search" button at the top to search by name, phone, or reservation number.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: The dashboard page displays all statistics, charts, and recent reservations.
dashboard.statsDesc: Total venue count, pending, accepted, and rejected reservation counts are updated in real-time.
dashboard.chartDesc: Bar chart of reservation requests for the last 7 days. Hover over each bar to see the exact number.
dashboard.exportDesc: Download statistics as an Excel file from the "Export Report" button. You can select weekly, monthly, or yearly periods.

statuses.title: Venue Statuses
statuses.intro: Each venue has a status. The status determines whether the venue is visible in the mobile app.
statuses.draft: Draft — The venue is not yet completed. Not visible in the app, only exists in the admin panel.
statuses.active: Active — The venue is published and shown to users in the mobile app. Can receive reservations.
statuses.tempClosed: Temporarily Closed — The venue exists but is temporarily not providing service. Shown as "closed" in the app.

simulation.title: Floor Plan
simulation.subtitle: Design your club visually
simulation.noVenueDesc: Before drawing the floor plan, create a venue in the Venues section.

studio.entryTitle: Do you want to enter Simulation Studio?
studio.entryBody: Studio mode gives the whole screen to the floor plan and temporarily hides the dashboard sidebar and top bar. When you enter, the browser fullscreen mode will be requested.
studio.fullscreenFallback: The browser did not allow fullscreen mode. Studio still opened in full-window mode.
studio.exitSaveError: Could not save the floor plan while exiting Studio.
studio.emptyBody: Grab a PC type from the left and drop it onto this scene. Then select the card and edit its name, status and price from the right panel.

palette.heading: Objects
palette.tip: Drag and drop objects onto the canvas.

properties.title: Properties
properties.emptyHint: Click an object on the canvas to see its properties.
properties.name: Name

addPcModal.title: Add new PC type
addPcModal.desc: Create a new PC tier to place on the floor.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.body: Use this screen to visually simulate your internet cafe floor. Drag dynamic PC types from the left, then manage their status and prices from the right panel.

palette.title: 1. Object palette
palette.body: Standard, medium, VIP and any other PC types come from Add Specs. Grab a card from the list and drop it onto the canvas.

properties.title: 2. Properties
properties.body: Select an object on the canvas. From the right panel you can change its name, status, hourly price, capacity and size.

connect.title: 3. Connecting tables
connect.body: Drag an edge anchor from the selected card to another card to draw a connection line. Use this for PCs that are neighbors or should be used together.

cabinet.title: 4. Zoom and space
cabinet.body: Use the zoom controls in the top bar to see the large floor clearly. The first view is zoomed out so the PC placement area is visible.

shortcuts.title: 5. Keyboard
shortcuts.body: Ctrl+Z — undo, Del — delete, Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V — copy/paste, Ctrl+X — cut. Changes are auto-saved.
